description_long: This is a large, cylindrical orange water cooler with a white lid, commonly used for dispensing cold beverages in outdoor or urban environments. The body is made of durable plastic and features two white side handles for easy carrying, as well as a prominent white spout at the bottom for dispensing liquids. The front displays a large Gatorade logo with a lightning bolt, indicating its use for sports or public events. The lid is slightly domed and also features the Gatorade logo, fitting snugly to keep contents insulated. On the back, there are two sturdy white handles for lifting, and the overall construction suggests it is designed to be both portable and robust. The surface is smooth and slightly glossy, with minimal visible seams or joints.
description: A large orange cylindrical water cooler with a white lid, Gatorade branding, side handles, and a dispensing spout at the bottom. Designed for portability and outdoor use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Gatorade logo, white lid, side handles, and the dispensing spout at the bottom.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the two white carrying handles and the smooth orange surface, with the spout partially visible on the side.
description_view_2: Side view displaying both white side handles and the uninterrupted orange cylindrical body, with no visible spout or branding.
description_view_3: Opposite rear view with the two white handles clearly visible and the spout just visible on the side.
attribute_dispenser_spout_type: rotary tap spout with a round knob
attribute_control_panel_design: No control panel; only a manual spout for dispensing.
